LAW AND MOTION 301, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, NOLA HYLTON, WILLIAM DILLON'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEADED A CURRENT COGNIZABLE CONTROVERSY AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 AND PLAINTIFF HAS IMPERMISABLY PLEADED CONTRACTICTORY FACTS AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 AND IN ANY EVENT CAUSE OF ACTION 2 IS BARRED BY CO-WORKER IMMUNITY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA, NOLA HYLTON, WILLIAM DILLON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD A RIPE CLAIM FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF AGAINST THE UNIVERSITY AND TO PLEAD INTERFERENCE WITH A 3RD PARTY CONTRACT THAT HAS ALREADY CAUSED COGNIZABLE INJURY IF THE PLAINTIFF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189(301/PJB)
